_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
reference_document_element_description: Skill in designing and executing complex analytical projects independently, including scoping, methodology selection, execution, and executive-level communication of findings.
comments: DCWF ksa superset of WIDAI AB domain. AB-S-003 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: AB-A-002 (AB, cosine: 0.581), AB-S-007 (AB, cosine: 0.542).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 6.0/10 (raw 0.602). Shared vocabulary: [analytical]. DCWF-only terms [ability, constructs, utilize] vs WIDAI-only terms [communication, complex, designing, executing, execution, executive] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.864 (P=0.892, R=0.837). P exceeds R by 0.055 — the DCWF element's 5 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 19 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the DCWF element.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.9%). "Ability to utilize analytical constructs" and "Skill in designing and executing complex analytical projects independently, incl" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.582 ≈ STS 0.602 (gap 0.021). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [analytical] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 4.3%. Shared tokens: [analytical]. DCWF-only: [ability, constructs, utilize]. WIDAI-only: [communication, complex, designing, executing, execution, executive].
